summary: Iteration 6 — QuickBookModal (airport full-payment + day-tour 10% deposit) and Badulla team redesign fully verified. 14/14 backend pytest passing; full frontend e2e for both new modals including Stripe redirect. All iteration_5 regression flows still pass.

issues: Minor React hydration console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Caused by Emergent preview-tool's x-source instrumentation wrapping option text in a span. Not a functional bug (select still works, price updates live), but if the warning is noisy in prod it can be silenced by ensuring option children are plain strings only.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py `bookings_create_checkout` correctly re-computes total and deposit server-side (verified via test_server_recomputes_deposit_when_frontend_lies) — good defence-in-depth against client-side tampering.

`/api/admin/bookings` only returns `payment_status == 'paid'` documents. Because Stripe is in test mode and no payments are completed, the Bookings tab always shows 0 even after creating checkout sessions. This is expected behaviour but may surprise users reviewing the admin dashboard; consider surfacing a 'pending' list too or adding a hint in the UI.

QuickBookModal hardcodes `num_travellers: 1` regardless of `pax` stepper value (pax is only captured in special_requests text). If pricing ever changes to per-person for airport/day-tour, this would silently under-charge.

QuickBookModal uses mixed-case mode string ('dayTour') in data-testid (`qb-dayTour-*`, `quickbook-dayTour`). Works but inconsistent with kebab-case service-cta-day-tour — mildly annoying for test writers; consider normalising to kebab-case.
QuickBookModal imports `useMemo` but never uses it (dead import).
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_-prefixed trip inquiries and 4 booking sessions (airport full-payment, day-tour deposit, server-recompute probe, and two frontend-driven sessions). All land in MongoDB with payment_status='pending' so they don't appear in /api/admin/bookings (which filters to paid only) — this matches iteration_5 behaviour.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 verified: QuickBookModal airport (full payment $35 = deposit_amount = total_price, label 'Pay in full'), QuickBookModal day-tour (SUV $110 total → $11 deposit, label '10% deposit'), both pay buttons gated on name/email/whatsapp + agreement, both redirect to checkout.stripe.com, both create booking docs with correct is_full_payment flag. Road-trip service card still opens BookNowModal (3-step flow). Team section shows 'Two friends from Badulla. One very well-loved car.' heading, multi-paragraph Badulla origin story, THE BASICS sidebar (3 items), Kasun Perera + Tharushi Silva cards, 'Badulla, Sri Lanka' chip. Admin login with 'changeme-serendib-admin' works, Leads tab shows 30 leads, Bookings tab shows 0 (expected — filters to payment_status=paid). Language switch EN→DE translates nav labels. Backend re-computes total/deposit server-side ignoring frontend-sent deposit_amount, MongoDB _id excluded from all responses. Only nit: InstantPriceWidget prints a benign 'span in option' React warning from preview instrumentation.
